definitions.A_within_occ__task_compactness: Distances from tasks (pc1,pc2) to occupation center (pc1,pc2). Lower means tasks cluster more tightly within an occupation.
definitions.B_between_occ__separation_index_inter_ov: Mean distance between occupation centers divided by mean within-occupation task spread.
definitions.B_neighbors__knn_same_family_share: For each occupation, share of its 10 nearest occupations that are in the same Job Family.
definitions.C_family__family_spread: Distances from occupations to their Job Family center (pc1,pc2). Lower means the family is more compact.
definitions.C_family__directionality_R: Angular concentration in xi (R). Higher means stronger shared direction within family.
